list.name: wallet
list.label: Wallet
list.query: SELECT label || ' (0x' || substr(address, 3, 6) || '…)' AS __text, address AS __value FROM tracked_wallets ORDER BY label

targets.rawSql: WITH r AS (SELECT pnl_usdc, status, decided_at FROM hypothetical_pnl WHERE status IN ('win','lose','invalid') AND pnl_usdc IS NOT NULL), windows(label, ord, since) AS (VALUES ('24h',1,interval '24 hours'),('7d',2,interval '7 days'),('14d',3,interval '14 days'),('30d',4,interval '30 days'),('60d',5,interval '60 days'),('365d',6,interval '365 days')) SELECT w.label AS "Janela", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.decided_at > now() - w.since) AS "Trades", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.status = 'win' AND r.decided_at > now() - w.since) AS "Wins", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.status = 'lose' AND r.decided_at > now() - w.since) AS "Losses", ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(r.pnl_usdc) FILTER (WHERE r.decided_at > now() - w.since), 0)::numeric, 2) AS "PnL USDC", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.status='win' AND r.decided_at > now() - w.since) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.status IN ('win','lose') AND r.decided_at > now() - w.since), 0), 1) AS "Winrate %" FROM windows w LEFT JOIN r ON true GROUP BY w.label, w.ord ORDER BY w.ord;
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS "Pendentes" FROM hypothetical_pnl WHERE status = 'pending';

panels.title: Notifier filter — min size USDC
panels.description: Threshold atual do filtro K1. Editar via: uv run python -m polycopy.scripts.set_notifier_filter --min-size <valor>. Hot reload em até 30s.

targets.rawSql: SELECT value::numeric AS "Min USDC" FROM notifier_config WHERE key = 'min_size_usdc';

SELECT resolved_at AS "time", SUM(pnl_usdc) OVER (ORDER BY resolved_at, trade_event_id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::float AS "Cumulativo USDC" FROM hypothetical_pnl WHERE status IN ('win','lose','invalid') AND pnl_usdc IS NOT NULL ORDER BY resolved_at;

SELECT wallet AS "Wallet", COUNT(*) AS "Trades", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'win') AS "Wins", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'lose') AS "Losses", ROUND(SUM(pnl_usdc)::numeric, 2) AS "PnL USDC", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='win') / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('win','lose')), 0), 1) AS "Winrate %" FROM hypothetical_pnl WHERE status IN ('win','lose','invalid') GROUP BY wallet ORDER BY "PnL USDC" DESC NULLS LAST;

SELECT c.rank AS "#", c.address AS "Address", c.label AS "Label", ROUND(c.volume_usdc::numeric, 2) AS "Volume USDC", ROUND(c.pnl_usdc::numeric, 2) AS "PnL USDC", c.verified_badge AS "Verified" FROM discovery_candidates c WHERE c.run_id = (SELECT id FROM discovery_runs ORDER BY generated_at DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY c.rank;

SELECT tw.label AS "Label", tw.address AS "Address", COALESCE(s.trades, 0) AS "Trades", COALESCE(s.pending, 0) AS "Pending", ROUND(COALESCE(s.pnl_total, 0)::numeric, 2) AS "PnL USDC" FROM tracked_wallets tw LEFT JOIN (SELECT wallet, COUNT(*) AS trades, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='pending') AS pending, SUM(pnl_usdc) AS pnl_total FROM hypothetical_pnl GROUP BY wallet) s ON s.wallet = tw.address ORDER BY "PnL USDC" DESC NULLS LAST;
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pnl_usdc), 0)::numeric, 2) AS "PnL" FROM hypothetical_pnl WHERE wallet = '${wallet}' AND status IN ('win','lose','invalid') AND decided_at > now() - interval '24 hours';
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pnl_usdc), 0)::numeric, 2) AS "PnL" FROM hypothetical_pnl WHERE wallet = '${wallet}' AND status IN ('win','lose','invalid') AND decided_at > now() - interval '7 days';
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pnl_usdc), 0)::numeric, 2) AS "PnL" FROM hypothetical_pnl WHERE wallet = '${wallet}' AND status IN ('win','lose','invalid') AND decided_at > now() - interval '30 days';
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS "Pendentes" FROM hypothetical_pnl WHERE wallet = '${wallet}' AND status = 'pending';

SELECT decided_at AS "Decidido", side AS "Side", ROUND(final_size_usdc::numeric, 2) AS "Size USDC", ROUND(expected_avg_price::numeric, 4) AS "Expected px", condition_id AS "Condition", token_id AS "Token" FROM hypothetical_pnl WHERE wallet = '${wallet}' AND status = 'pending' ORDER BY decided_at DESC;

panels.title: PnL realizado 24h — $wallet (real wallet)
panels.description: Soma de pnl_usdc dos trades resolvidos da wallet nesta janela. Fica $0.00 enquanto nenhum mercado da wallet resolveu (caso atual: wallets fazem apostas em eventos futuros — Copa 2026, eleições, etc.). Vai popular conforme mercados fecharem.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pnl_usdc), 0)::numeric, 2) AS "PnL" FROM wallet_realized_pnl WHERE wallet = '${wallet}' AND status IN ('win','lose','invalid') AND occurred_at > now() - interval '24 hours';

panels.title: PnL realizado 7d — $wallet (real wallet)
panels.description: Soma de pnl_usdc dos trades resolvidos da wallet nesta janela. Fica $0.00 enquanto nenhum mercado da wallet resolveu (caso atual: wallets fazem apostas em eventos futuros).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pnl_usdc), 0)::numeric, 2) AS "PnL" FROM wallet_realized_pnl WHERE wallet = '${wallet}' AND status IN ('win','lose','invalid') AND occurred_at > now() - interval '7 days';

panels.title: PnL realizado 30d — $wallet (real wallet)
panels.description: Soma de pnl_usdc dos trades resolvidos da wallet nesta janela. Fica $0.00 enquanto nenhum mercado da wallet resolveu.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pnl_usdc), 0)::numeric, 2) AS "PnL" FROM wallet_realized_pnl WHERE wallet = '${wallet}' AND status IN ('win','lose','invalid') AND occurred_at > now() - interval '30 days';

panels.title: PnL realizado all-time — $wallet (real wallet)
panels.description: Soma de pnl_usdc all-time. Fica $0.00 enquanto nenhum mercado da wallet resolveu (resolver checa 100/h via Gamma; ver dashboard do resolver pra progresso).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(pnl_usdc), 0)::numeric, 2) AS "PnL" FROM wallet_realized_pnl WHERE wallet = '${wallet}' AND status IN ('win','lose','invalid');

panels.title: Posições abertas — $wallet (mercados ainda não resolvidos)
panels.description: JOIN com tabela markets pra trazer descrição (question) + slug. MarketdataAgent sincroniza só top-N mercados ativos, então ~58% dos conditions ficam sem descrição (mostra o condition_id truncado como fallback). Coluna Slug é clicável e abre o mercado na Polymarket.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(m.question), '— condition ' || left(p.condition_id, 12) || '…') AS "Mercado", MAX(m.slug) AS "Slug", p.token_id AS "Token", ROUND(p.net_qty::numeric, 4) AS "Qty", ROUND(p.net_cost_usdc::numeric, 2) AS "Custo USDC", p.first_trade_at AS "Primeiro", p.last_trade_at AS "Último" FROM wallet_open_positions p LEFT JOIN markets m ON m.condition_id = p.condition_id WHERE p.wallet = '${wallet}' GROUP BY p.condition_id, p.token_id, p.net_qty, p.net_cost_usdc, p.first_trade_at, p.last_trade_at ORDER BY p.net_cost_usdc DESC;
